title: Dedicated funds database
doc_html:
NOTE: §582 eff. if and when a deposit is made into the Louisiana Transparency Fund. See Acts 2023, No. 446.

§582. Dedicated funds database

            A. The auditor shall ensure that the website includes a dedicated funds database that is electronically searchable by the public.

            B. All state agencies shall provide information pursuant to this Section that contains the electronic database of reports supported by appropriations from dedicated funds required by R.S. 49:308.5(B).

            C. The dedicated funds database shall include access to the report on special funds prepared by the state treasurer as required by R.S. 49:308.3(E).

            Acts 2023, No. 446, §1, see Act.
doc_text:
NOTE:  §582 eff. if and when a deposit is made into the Louisiana Transparency Fund. See
Acts 2023, No. 446.
§582.  Dedicated funds database
A.  The auditor shall ensure that the website includes a dedicated funds database that
is electronically searchable by the public.
B.  All state agencies shall provide information pursuant to this Section that contains
the electronic database of reports supported by appropriations from dedicated funds
required by R.S. 49:308.5(B).
C.  The dedicated funds database shall include access to the report on special funds
prepared by the state treasurer as required by R.S. 49:308.3(E).
Acts 2023, No. 446, §1, see Act.
